headline: Basin rig count up two as prices rise
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was up two this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 257 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 275 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 563 rigs. A year ago, 559 rigs were active. The count shows that 431 rigs sought oil, up two from the previous week, and 124 explored for ...
